## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Ablefy and GrowthX for content strategy and internationalization support.](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX specializes in AI-driven content creation and strategy, focusing on English-language markets](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Ablefy operates primarily in German-speaking markets (90% of traffic) but is exploring internationalization](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Current mismatch in immediate needs: Ablefy seeks consulting/framework support, while GrowthX's core offering is content production](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Potential future collaboration when Ablefy expands to English-speaking markets](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Service Offering

  - [Platform-as-a-service with AI-driven workflows for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Focus on scaling editorial content (5-15 long-form pieces/week)](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Human-in-the-loop approach for strategy and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Specializes in SEO, AEO (AI Engine Optimization), and content visibility](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Two-phase engagement: 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by long-term collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

### Ablefy's Current Situation and Needs

  - [90% German-speaking customer base, with growing English-speaking segment](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [In-house German content team; not seeking direct content creation](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Looking for:](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [Framework building and process automation support](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [Channel analysis and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Measurement and experimentation guidance](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
      - [Consulting to speed up AI adoption in marketing](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Ablefy's internationalization plans could align with GrowthX's expertise](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
  - [Timeline: Ablefy focusing on payment/tax compliance for new markets in the next quarter](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [GrowthX typically books 6 weeks in advance for new engagements](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)

### Service Gaps and Future Possibilities

  - [GrowthX currently doesn't offer standalone consulting services](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Potential for GrowthX to develop consulting offerings in the future](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [Ablefy open to coaching/consulting to streamline processes and improve communication strategies](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to consider developing consulting services separate from content production](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Ablefy to reach out when entering new English-speaking markets for potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
  - [Both parties to stay in touch and reassess fit as needs and offerings evolve](https://fathom.video/share/dnkzL2gdxzzowvxLtz8ATy23QQkozEXF?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
